name: clawsec-scanner
description: Automated vulnerability scanner for agent platforms. Performs dependency scanning (npm audit, pip-audit), multi-database CVE lookup (OSV, NVD, GitHub Advisory), SAST analysis (Semgrep, Bandit), and agent-specific static hook inspection for OpenClaw hooks.
author: prompt-security

files.description: Scanner skill documentation and usage guide
Main orchestration script for running all scanner engines
Dependency scanner using npm audit and pip-audit with JSON parsing
Multi-database CVE lookup (OSV primary, NVD/GitHub fallback)
Static analysis engine running Semgrep and Bandit as subprocesses
Static OpenClaw hook inspection harness that does not execute target handlers
Static hook source inspection helper used by DAST without importing target handlers
Hook installer for continuous monitoring integration
Unified vulnerability report generator (JSON and human-readable formats)
Shared utility functions for subprocess execution and JSON parsing
TypeScript type definitions for Vulnerability and ScanReport schemas
OpenClaw hook metadata for continuous scanning integration
OpenClaw hook handler for periodic vulnerability scanning
